hero.title: Parking Air Conditioner for Off-Grid Life & Mobile Comfort
hero.subtitle: 12V & 24V DC No-Idle Parking AC for Semi Trucks, RVs, Vans & Campers — Cool Without Idling

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Parking Air Conditioner
products.description: Battery-powered parking air conditioners for semi trucks, RVs, vans and campers. Cool without idling — save fuel, reduce emissions, stay comfortable.

topMounted.title: 12000 BTU Top-Mounted Parking Air Conditioner
topMounted.subtitle: 12V/24V DC No-Idle RV & Truck Parking AC
topMounted.description: The ultimate R410A dual rotary compressor parking air conditioner for RVs, semi trucks, and vans. This 12V/24V DC no-idle parking AC delivers 12000 BTU cooling — keeping your cab or camper comfortable without running the engine. Features undervoltage battery protection and whisper-quiet operation at 45 dB.
topMounted.imageAlt: 10000 BTU top-mounted parking air conditioner exploded view – 12V/24V DC no-idle RV truck AC

miniSplit.title: 12000 BTU Mini Split Parking Air Conditioner
miniSplit.subtitle: 12V DC No-Idle AC for Semi Trucks & RVs
miniSplit.description: High-capacity 12V DC mini split parking air conditioner designed for semi truck cabs, RVs, and cargo vans. With 12000 BTU of no-idle cooling power, this ductless parking AC runs directly off your vehicle battery — no generator, no shore power needed. Horizontal rooftop installation fits most trucks and campers.
miniSplit.imageAlt: 12000 BTU mini split parking air conditioner for semi truck and RV – 12V DC no-idle

waterHeater.title: 65000 BTU Tankless Water Heater for RV & Truck
waterHeater.subtitle: On-Demand Propane Heater for Off-Grid Living
waterHeater.description: Complete your off-grid comfort system with this 65,000 BTU tankless water heater, purpose-built for RVs, semi trucks, and campers. Delivers 2.9 GPM of instant hot water — the perfect companion to your parking air conditioner for year-round comfort on the road.
waterHeater.imageAlt: 65000 BTU tankless water heater for RV and semi truck – off-grid hot water

heatingCoolingAC.title: V-TH1 Heating & Cooling Parking Air Conditioner
heatingCoolingAC.subtitle: 12V/24V DC Dual-Mode Rotor AC — Year-Round Comfort
heatingCoolingAC.description: The first dual-mode parking air conditioner from CoolDrivePro. The V-TH1 delivers up to 2,000W cooling in summer and heats your cab from 5°C to 30°C in just 30 minutes during winter. Powered by a GMCC twin-rotary compressor with R134A refrigerant, this 12V/24V DC rotor AC provides year-round climate control for trucks, RVs, vans, and special vehicles — no engine idling required.
heatingCoolingAC.imageAlt: V-TH1 heating and cooling parking air conditioner – 12V/24V DC dual-mode rotor AC

detail.shippingDesc: Free shipping on orders over $500 to continental US. 3-5 business days delivery.
detail.warrantyDesc: 2-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship.
detail.returnsDesc: 30-day easy return policy. Full refund if not satisfied.

features.title: Why Choose CoolDrivePro
features.subtitle: Engineered for reliability and efficiency in demanding conditions
features.subTitle: Built for No-Idle Performance

power.title: 12V DC Battery-Powered Parking AC
power.description: Our parking air conditioners run directly off the vehicle's 12V or 24V battery — not the engine belt. This no-idle design delivers continuous cooling comfort when parked, eliminating fuel costs and engine wear. Built-in undervoltage protection ensures your parking AC never drains the battery below safe levels.
power.imageAlt: Semi truck with 12V parking air conditioner – no-idle DC powered cooling

efficiency.title: High-Efficiency No-Idle Cooling & Heating
efficiency.description: With 12,000 BTU cooling (Mini Split) and 10,000 BTU cooling / 4,500 BTU heating (Top-Mounted), our parking air conditioners deliver powerful climate control at a COP ≥2.5. Variable-speed DC scroll compressor technology means your parking AC uses only the energy needed — maximizing battery runtime.
efficiency.imageAlt: RV camping in mountains – energy efficient parking air conditioner

installation.title: Simple Parking AC Installation
installation.description: Every parking air conditioner ships with a complete installation kit, pre-charged refrigerant lines, and a step-by-step manual. No HVAC certification required. Most installations take 2–4 hours. Compatible with standard 14" RV roof openings and universal truck cab mounting brackets.
installation.imageAlt: Installing parking air conditioner on RV roof – easy DIY installation

battery.title: Smart Battery Protection for Parking AC
battery.description: Our parking air conditioners feature multi-level electrical safety protection including undervoltage cutoff (8–11V), overcurrent protection, and thermal shutdown. Your vehicle battery is protected from deep discharge — critical for reliable engine starting after a full night of parking AC operation.
battery.imageAlt: Semi truck cab – parking air conditioner with battery protection

durability.title: Parking AC Built for Extreme Climates
durability.description: Our parking air conditioners are rigorously tested from -28°C to +50°C ambient temperatures. Whether you're parked in a desert truck stop in Arizona or a winter rest area in Minnesota, your parking AC maintains optimal performance. IP54-rated components resist dust and moisture.
durability.imageAlt: RV in desert – parking air conditioner for extreme heat

noise.title: Whisper-Quiet Parking Air Conditioner
noise.description: At just 40 dB, our parking air conditioners are among the quietest on the market. Brushless dual-fan technology delivers high air volume without noise — so you can sleep comfortably while your parking AC works. Ideal for residential neighborhoods and campgrounds with noise restrictions.
noise.imageAlt: Peaceful campsite at night – quiet parking air conditioner operation

useCases.title: Perfect For
useCases.subtitle: Trusted by drivers across multiple industries
useCases.mainTitle: Parking Air Conditioner for Every Vehicle
useCases.semiTrucksDesc: Designed for Class 8 semi truck cabs. Our 12V/24V parking air conditioner keeps drivers cool during mandatory rest periods — no idling required. Compliant with anti-idling regulations in all 50 US states.
useCases.rvsDesc: Off-grid cooling for Class A, B, and C motorhomes, travel trailers, and fifth wheels. Run your parking AC directly from your lithium battery bank or solar system — no shore power needed.
useCases.vansDesc: Compact 12V parking air conditioner units perfect for cargo van conversions, Sprinter vans, and camper vans. Low-profile design fits standard van roof heights without modification.
useCases.noIdleDesc: Replace costly engine idling with battery-powered no-idle parking AC. Save up to $8–12 per hour in fuel costs. Reduce engine wear and lower carbon emissions at truck stops and rest areas.
useCases.solarDesc: Pair our 12V parking air conditioner with rooftop solar panels for truly free cooling. DC-direct solar compatibility means your parking AC can run continuously during daylight hours.
useCases.apuDesc: A cost-effective alternative to diesel APU (Auxiliary Power Unit) systems. Our electric parking air conditioner delivers equivalent cooling at a fraction of the installation and operating cost.

about.title: About CoolDrivePro
about.subtitle: Parking Air Conditioner Experts
about.missionText: To make reliable, affordable parking air conditioners accessible to every truck driver, RV owner, and van lifer in the world.
about.qualityText: We never compromise on product quality. Every unit is rigorously tested.
about.customerText: We're dedicated to providing exceptional support and service.
about.innovationText: We continuously improve our products with the latest technology.
about.heroTitle: Built by Truckers, for Truckers — and Everyone on the Road
about.heroDesc: CoolDrivePro was founded with one mission: to make reliable, affordable parking air conditioners accessible to every truck driver, RV owner, and van lifer worldwide.
about.story1: In 2019, our founder — a former long-haul truck driver with 15 years on the road — was sitting in a truck stop in Phoenix, Arizona, watching the temperature gauge hit 112°F. He had two choices: idle the engine all night at $8/hour in fuel costs, or sweat through the night in his cab.
about.story2: There had to be a better way. After two years of research, testing, and working directly with DC compressor engineers, CoolDrivePro launched its first 12V parking air conditioner in 2021. The response from the trucking community was overwhelming.
about.story3: Today, CoolDrivePro parking AC units are used by over 15,000 truck drivers, RV owners, and van lifers across the world. We've saved our customers millions in fuel costs — and counting.
about.imageAlt: CoolDrivePro team – parking air conditioner specialists
about.performanceDesc: Every parking AC we sell must outperform the competition in real-world conditions — not just lab tests.
about.sustainabilityDesc: No-idle parking AC technology reduces diesel emissions at truck stops by up to 90% compared to engine idling.
about.communityDesc: We listen to truck drivers, RV owners, and van lifers. Every product improvement comes from real user feedback.
about.warrantyDesc: Our warranty means exactly that — no fine print, no hassle. If it breaks, we fix it or replace it.
about.joinDrivers: Join 15,000+ drivers who've switched to CoolDrivePro parking air conditioners. Free shipping on all US orders.
about.partnerDesc: CoolDrivePro works alongside trusted partners to bring the best mobile comfort solutions to drivers worldwide.
